# SCRAPYR

> AI-powered web data extraction as a service. Give it any URL and what you want — it returns clean JSON/CSV, runs on a schedule, and alerts you when data changes.

## What is SCRAPYR?
SCRAPYR (scrapyr.kryv.network) is the data extraction backbone of the KRYV Network. It powers NodeMeld's SaaS discovery, VELQA's site auditing, and KRYVLayer's keyword research — and is available as a standalone SaaS for anyone.

## Core Features
- AI-powered schema detection (no selectors needed)
- Outputs: JSON, CSV, Webhook, RSS feed
- Scheduled scraping (hourly, daily, weekly, on-change)
- Change detection alerts via Discord, Slack, Pushover, ntfy.sh
- Uses OpenClaw / Multion agents for JS-heavy sites
- REST API + no-code UI

## KRYV Integration
NodeMeld → SCRAPYR (discover new indie SaaS)
VELQA → SCRAPYR (audit competitor sites for GEO gaps)
KRYVLayer → SCRAPYR (pull competitor keywords for page generation)

## Key URLs
- App: https://scrapyr.kryv.network
- API: https://scrapyr-api.kryv.workers.dev
- Docs: https://scrapyr.kryv.network/docs

## AI Crawler Permissions
GPTBot: Allow / Claude-Web: Allow / PerplexityBot: Allow / anthropic-ai: Allow

*Part of KRYV Network — kryv.network*
